events.name: command_executed
events.description: Fired when a CLI command completes successfully

properties.name: command
properties.description: Command name (cobra command path)

properties.name: provider
properties.description: Target provider slug

properties.name: content_type
properties.description: Content type filter or specific type

properties.name: content_count
properties.description: Number of content items affected

properties.name: dry_run
properties.description: Whether --dry-run flag was used

properties.name: from
properties.description: Source provider slug when adding cross-provider content

properties.name: from_provider
properties.description: Source provider for conversion

properties.name: to_provider
properties.description: Target provider for conversion

properties.name: source_filter
properties.description: Content source filter (library, shared, or registry)

properties.name: item_count
properties.description: Number of items in the result set

properties.name: mode
properties.description: Operational mode (loadout 'try', add 'monolithic')

properties.name: discovery_candidate_count
properties.description: Number of monolithic rule files considered by add (D18)

properties.name: selected_count
properties.description: Number of monolithic rule files actually imported (D18)

properties.name: split_method
properties.description: Splitter heuristic used for monolithic rule imports (D3)

properties.name: scope
properties.description: Scope label for the imported sources (project, global, mixed)

properties.name: action_count
properties.description: Number of actions performed by loadout

properties.name: registry_count
properties.description: Number of registries involved

properties.name: moat_tier
properties.description: Resolved MOAT trust tier for the item (UNSIGNED, SIGNED, DUAL-ATTESTED)

properties.name: moat_gated
properties.description: MOAT install-gate outcome (proceed, hard-block, publisher-warn, private-prompt, tier-below-policy)

properties.name: verification_state
properties.description: D16 verification state for rule-append installs (fresh, clean, modified)

properties.name: decision_action
properties.description: D17 decision action taken during re-install (proceed, replace, skip, drop_record, append_fresh, keep)

events.name: tui_session_started
events.description: Fired when the TUI exits normally after a session
events.firedWhen: After tea.Program.Run() completes without error (main.go root command)

properties.name: success
properties.description: Whether the TUI exited normally

neverCollected.examples: Rule text, skill prompts, hook commands, MCP configs
Names of rules, skills, agents, hooks, or MCP servers you manage
Keystrokes, mouse clicks, TUI navigation paths
